ddls:
CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "reference_number" TEXT /* Reference number for the contract */,
  "contract_title" TEXT /* Title of the contract */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the contract */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the contract */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of the contract (e.g., service contract, sales agreement, consultancy agreement) */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Current status of the contract (e.g., active, inactive, pending, awarded) */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the vendors table */,
  "procurement_manager_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "contract_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the contract */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the contract */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the contract was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the contract */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the contract was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "vendor_address" TEXT /* Address of the vendor */,
  "vendor_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the vendor */,
  "vendor_email" TEXT /* Email address of the vendor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "procurement_process" (
  "procurement_process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each procurement process */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the contracts table */,
  "procurement_stage" TEXT /* Current stage of the procurement process (e.g., tendering, contract awarding, contract monitoring) */,
  "tender_documents" TEXT /* Tender documents */,
  "tender_opening_date" TEXT /* Date when the tender was opened */,
  "tender_closing_date" TEXT /* Date when the tender was closed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("procurement_process_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., procurement manager, contract administrator) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the roles table */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the contracts table */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Report data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
